class.name: GDKLeaderboards
class.brief_description: Xbox Services leaderboard service accessed via GDK.leaderboards.
class.description: Wraps read-only Xbox Services leaderboard queries backed by title-managed statistics. Query methods return one-shot completion [Signal] values that emit [GDKResult] with [GDKLeaderboard] data.

method.name: get_leaderboard_async
method.description: Queries the global leaderboard for [param stat_name]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly.

method.name: get_leaderboard_around_user_async
method.description: Queries the global leaderboard around [param user]'s XUID for [param stat_name].

method.name: get_social_leaderboard_async
method.description: Queries the social leaderboard for people followed by [param user].

method.name: get_next_page_async
method.description: Fetches the next page for a [GDKLeaderboard] returned by this service.

method.name: get_cached_leaderboard
method.description: Returns the cached leaderboard for [param stat_name], or [code]null[/code] if no query has populated it.

signal.name: leaderboard_updated
signal.description: Emitted when a leaderboard query or next-page request updates the cache.
